leadText: The Sprinklotad (Japanese: ハスボーじょうろ Hassboh Watering Can) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VI. It is a watering can fashioned after a Lotad.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Sprinklotad allows the player to water the trees they plant at the Berry fields .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A watering can shaped like a Lotad . It helps promote the healthy growth of any Berries planted in good, soft soil.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price X Y OR AS S M US UM N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Sprinklotad allows the player to water the trees they plant at the Berry fields . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A watering can shaped like a Lotad . It helps promote the healthy growth of any Berries planted in good, soft soil. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method X Y Berry fields (from the Berry grower after agreeing to help him grow Berries )

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The Sprinklotad is the only watering can whose design is not based on a pure Water-type Pokémon; Lotad is a Water/ Grass-type Pokémon.
